items.raw_desc: Jegyzetfüzet Leitz Cosy B5, vonalas, szürke:In the course of a day, we have to process countless thoughts. Write down anything you don't want to forget in this Leitz Cozy B5, Lined, Grey Notepad with B5 format. This notepad has a hard cover, so you can take it everywhere with you and not worry about damage.  It uses a lined paper. Everything is then connected by a loop binding, which allows you to rotate pages 360°. The cover is made of cardboard. A total of 80 pages are available for writing as well as drawing. It also has a rubber strap to close it easily. There is also a handy pocket, where you can keep various small items. The grey Leitz Notepad should be opened from side. Main Parameters of the Leitz Cozy B5, Lined, Grey Notebook Make notes of everything you don't want to forget Cover from a hard material  Loop design for easy flipping With 80 pages sheets Spine is oriented from side Other features: rubber strap and pocket The Leitz Notepad has grey colour Lined paper Grammage: 100 g/m2
